name: h5g-plugins
description: High 5 Games Claude plugin marketplace — slot art generation, skill auditing, and other game-production utilities.

plugins.name: skill-auditor
plugins.description: Audits a Claude skill against an 8-dimension quality rubric (frontmatter, description quality, instruction clarity, reference integrity, completeness, output spec, evals, security). Returns a READY / NEEDS WORK / DRAFT verdict with specific, actionable findings.

plugins.name: slot-art-creator-node
plugins.description: Generate, QA, and resize mobile slot machine art — symbols, UI, backgrounds, key art — with Nano Banana 2. Numbered slash-command workflow (slot-00 through slot-10), persistent project memory, key-art-anchored style consistency. Dual-provider: Gemini (NB2) for generation, fal.ai (NB Pro) for smart resize with Gemini fallback. Optional GPT-image-2 for paytables, logos, and photorealistic 4K composites. Node.js, no Python required.
